name: io.home-assistant/mcp-server
description: Home Assistant official MCP integration exposed from a user's Home Assistant instance for Assist API device context and control.

home_assistant_external_url.description: Public or gateway-proxied Home Assistant base host, without https://.

ai.quickdeploy.registry/auth.notes: Home Assistant supports MCP OAuth for capable clients and long-lived access tokens for clients that need bearer authentication.
